function.rulebook_notes: Used 40_projects rule that project folders are prefixed with project creation date YYYY_MM_DD and README.MD is canonical reference.
function.outcome_justification: The workflow product is Northstar Ledger because its README goal says it is turning workflow follow-up/context recall into a real small-team product. Its folder name starts with 2026_04_01, which is the project creation/start date per 40_projects/AGENTS.MD.
